welcome: 👋 Welcome, {name}! I can help you find and download images and videos from Pinterest. 📝 How to use: • Send me any search query (e.g., 'cats', 'beautiful landscapes') • I'll show you {batch_size} items at a time • Use the buttons to download, share, or remove each item 🔍 Try it now: Send me a search term!
help: 🤖 Pinterest Bot Help Commands: /start - Start the bot /help - Show this help /language - Change language /new - Start a new search /stop - Stop current search How to search: Simply type what you want to find! Features: • Shows {batch_size} items per batch • Download, share, and remove buttons for each item • Video support (if available) • Preview images to save bandwidth
no_images_found: ❌ No items found Please try a different search term.
no_images_available: ❌ No items available Please try again later.
no_more_images: ✨ No more items Use /new to start another search!
session_expired: ⚠️ Session expired Please start a new search.
search_stopped: ⏹️ Search stopped Use /new to start another search!
ready_for_search: 🆕 Ready for new search Send me what you'd like to find!
error_occurred: ❌ An error occurred Please try again later.
empty_query: Please send a non-empty search query.
share_instructions: Share file: {filename} 1. Click the button below 2. Select a chat 3. Send the message
